overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a player character walking across a wooden bridge over a rocky gorge, then traversing grassy fields alongside railroad tracks. The player encounters a horse-drawn carriage that passes by and continues down a winding dirt path through rolling countryside with scattered rock formations and utility poles.

events.description: exits the wooden bridge onto grassy terrain

agents.ego_description: crossing a wooden bridge overlooking a deep rocky gorge with a train bridge visible in the distance

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the bridge surface
dark wooden guardrail along the right side of the bridge
deep rocky canyon with boulders and sparse vegetation below
trestle bridge spanning the gorge in the distance
massive gray rock formation on the left bank

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wooden bridge crossing a rocky gorge. The camera moves forward across weathered wooden planks, passing a dark wooden railing on the right, with a deep canyon and distant train trestle visible ahead. Large rock outcrops line the left side as the character approaches the end of the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy field with dirt path approaching railroad

events.description: approaches and reaches the railroad tracks

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass along a dirt path toward a line of utility poles and railroad tracks

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail cutting through tall grass
wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms and wires
single set of steel rails on wooden ties
dark smoke rising in the distance against the sky

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bridge behind, the character walks through a wide grassy field along a dirt path. Wooden utility poles line the left side, and railroad tracks become visible in the distance. A column of dark smoke rises on the horizon as the character approaches the railway corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad track corridor with gravel bed

events.description: horse-drawn carriage appears in the distance on the left
horse-drawn carriage passes by the camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the railroad tracks as a horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead

notable_agents.action: red horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the path, passing the camera from left to right

entered.detail: red wooden stagecoach pulled by two horses with a driver on top
large gray boulders and rock piles alongside the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along the gravel railroad bed, the character encounters a red horse-drawn carriage approaching from the distance. The carriage, pulled by two horses with a driver seated on top, passes by on the left side. Large rocky outcrops line the path as the character continues alongside the tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding dirt path through rolling grassy hills

agents.ego_description: following the horse-drawn carriage along a winding dirt path through open countryside

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving ahead on the dirt path, gradually receding into the distance

entered.detail: rolling green hills rising on both sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The path diverges from the railroad tracks onto a winding dirt trail through rolling grassy hills. The horse-drawn carriage moves ahead in the same direction, gradually receding into the distance. Large rock formations dot the landscape as the character continues along the rural path under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins on a high wooden bridge and transitions into an expansive, rolling rural landscape. It begins by moving across weathered wooden planks over a rocky gorge, passing a dark railing with a distant train trestle visible ahead. As the camera leaves the bridge, the scene opens into a wide grassy field where wooden utility poles line a dirt path and a column of dark smoke rises on the horizon. The movement then shifts onto a gravel railroad bed, where a red horse-drawn carriage pulled by two horses passes by on the left amidst large rocky outcrops. Finally, the path diverges from the tracks onto a winding dirt trail, following the receding carriage through rolling hills and scattered rock formations under a partly cloudy sky.
